title: phlegmariurus cuneifolius
intro: Phlegmariurus cuneifolius, also known as the cuneate forked polypody, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus cuneifolius include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. The herbal preparation of Phlegmariurus cuneifolius can be made into infusions, decoctions, or teas, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
